title: Breadcrumb
description: The Breadcrumbs component displays a navigation trail of links, helping users track their location within an application's hierarchy and easily navigate back to previous sections. The component consists of two main parts: AXBreadCrumbsComponent (container) and AXBreadCrumbsItemComponent (individual items).

sections.title: Activated mode
sections.description: You can activate a breadcrumb item.

sections.title: Disabled mode
sections.description: You can disable a breadcrumb item.

sections.title: Icon Mode
sections.description: You can use icons with breadcrumb items.

sections.title: Custom Divider
sections.description: Use a custom divider template between items.

sections.title: Prefix and Suffix
sections.description: Add icons and badges using prefix/suffix slots.

sections.title: Dynamic (Async)
sections.description: Build breadcrumbs dynamically from the URL; includes a button to restart the async load.

sections.title: Overflow and Auto-Scroll
sections.description: Many levels to demonstrate horizontal overflow and auto-scroll to the last item.

sections.title: Long labels with tooltip
sections.description: Truncate long breadcrumb labels and reveal full text on hover via tooltip.

sections.title: Disabled change
sections.description: Toggle the disabled state of an item at runtime and observe disabledChange events.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

props.name: active
props.description: Indicates whether this breadcrumb item is the current active item.

props.name: _parent
props.description: Reference to the parent breadcrumbs component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the breadcrumb item. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emits an event whenever the disabled state of the component changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: tabIndexChange
events.description: Emits an event whenever the tabIndex of the component changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Fires each time the component gets focused. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Fires each time the component gets blurred. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Registers a callback function to be called when the component is touched.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns HTMLElement - The native DOM element.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration object.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)
